title: I Suddenly Found Myself as the Villainous General in a hack-and-slash Game~ I'll Smash Apart the Doom Route~
description:
A man working at a black company finds his only joy in playing the hack-and-slash game 'Brave of Kingdom' after returning home from work. However, one day, a strange screen appears before him. And before he knew it, he had been reincarnated in another world?!
In front of him is Selena, a female officer in a military uniform whom he's seen countless times in the game.  And what he sees in the mirror is a muscular bearded man..? Of all people, he has become the Villainous General Zeorg who's slain by the hero!
If things continue like this, his fate is doomed! However, having survived the "hell of modern times' corporative life", this man is not shaken by this situation!
Using his game knowledge and corporate slave skills, he'll become the invincible General Zeorg and smash apart his doomed path!!
author: Shinya Murata
